turns.speaker: D
turns.text: the doctor and the patient are gon na go right to the front- . so when Michelle touch that- hi , michelle , how is Michelle ?

turns.text: Michelle is good . how is the doctor ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: the doctor is good . so the doctor knows the nurse told Michelle about dax . the doctor would like to dax a little bit about Michelle , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right . so , michelle is a 31-year-old female with a past medical history of type 2 diabetes and hypertension who presents with abnormal lab finding . so , michelle , the abnormal lab finding came back to the doctor that Michelle had had a positive long ... lyme titer .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and so , uh , can Michelle , Michelle , you know , can Michelle tell the doctor a little bit about the positive long ... lyme titer ? the doctor knows the last time the doctor saw Michelle , Michelle had had an insect bite , and you know , the insect bite came back positive for lyme . so how is Michelle feeling ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: Michelle has been feeling ... Michelle could feel better . um ... Michelle has been feeling tired , um , really lacking a lot of energy , and Michelle has swollen joints in Michelle's elbows , Michelle's swollen joints in Michelle's elbows just really hurts .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . and has Michelle had any , any body aches ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , Michelle has .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . um , and the doctor knows that Michelle was out hiking in the woods and , and that type of thing a couple of weeks ago , and the doctor and Michelle thought that hiking in the woods was where Michelle got the bite . so , um , how's Michelle's , how's Michelle's appetite ? has Michelle been okay ? a little nauseous ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , Michelle has been a little nauseous . Michelle has n't been able to eat much . Michelle has been trying just to keep , you know , toast and crackers and toast and crackers and that's all about Michelle has been able to stomach , really .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , and , and the doctor knows that Michelle had had that , that , uh , bite there . has Michelle noticed any other rash anywhere else ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , Michelle has .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . sometimes people kind of describe the rash as looking as like a bull's-eye .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: is the rash what the rash looked like ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . well , um , has Michelle had any , any high fevers ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , no , not that Michelle has noticed .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right . um , and how about from a diabetes standpoint ? how ... how's Michelle's blood sugar been running ? especially now that Michelle kind of have this , like , acute thing going on ? have Michelle's blood sugars been okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: Michelle's blood sugars have been okay . Michelle has noticed that Michelle's blood sugars sometimes get a little high and a little low . um , but nothing too far out of range .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . um , and is Michelle still taking the metformin ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . good . and then in terms of Michelle's high blood pressure , is Michelle monitoring the blood pressures at home ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , Michelle , Michelle has a ... Michelle bought a cuff last year , and Michelle has been , um , taking the blood pressure with the cuff herself at home . the blood pressures have looked good . Michelle has been staying away from the salty foods .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: um , so managing the blood pressures has been good .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and , um , so is Michelle still taking the lisinopril ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , great . all right , well , you know , the doctor knows that Michelle did the review of systems sheet when Michelle checked in , and the doctor knows that Michelle is endorsing some nausea and some joint pain and some body aches . any other symptoms ? abdominal pain ? diarrhea ? anything like that ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , nothing like abdominal pain or diarrhea .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . um , so let's go ahead , and the doctor will ... the doctor is gon na do a quick physical exam .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D

Michelle do n't have a fever at that ... at this time , so that is really encouraging . the doctor is just gon na check Michelle out , and , uh , the doctor is gon na listen to Michelle's heart and lungs and look for any rashes and let Michelle know what the doctor finds , okay ?

turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , so on physical examination , you know , Michelle do have some swelling of Michelle's , uh , elbow joints bilaterally . um , does the swelling of Michelle's elbow joints hurt when the doctor touches the swelling of Michelle's elbow joints ?

turns.speaker: D

turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon , show the doctor the lyme titer . so Michelle can see here , you know , in reviewing the results of Michelle's lyme titer , Michelle's lyme titer is elevated . so the doctor and Michelle are gon na go ahead and do some further testing , but the doctor and Michelle are gon na , you know , the doctor and Michelle are gon na look into the elevated lyme titer , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon , show the doctor the labs . and in reviewing the results of Michelle's labs , everything else looks good . so again , you know , Michelle do n't have an elevated white blood cell count or anything like that . so the doctor thinks the doctor got the lyme disease early enough , and the doctor can go ahead and , and treat the lyme disease , okay ?
